headline: McDonald's Expands Value Menu With $3 Items
summary: Fast-food giant aims to attract budget-conscious customers with new low-priced offerings.

raw.headline: McDonald's Expands Value Menu With $3 Items
raw.summary: Fast-food giant aims to attract budget-conscious customers with new low-priced offerings.

headline: How The Yum Brands (YUM) Narrative Is Shifting On Growth Quality And Pizza Hut Uncertainty
summary: Yum! Brands is back in focus as analysts update their price targets, with several firms now grouped in the US$170 to US$179 range, while a key fair value marker sits at US$171.75. Behind those numbers, bullish voices are leaning into the quality of Yum's growth profile and potential portfolio changes, while more cautious analysts highlight recent share performance and the uncertainty around any Pizza Hut move. As you read on, you will see how this split view is shaping the evolving narrative...

headline: Qatari Fund Cooks Up a Premium Papa Johns Bid
summary: Papa Johns said last month it’ll close more than 300 stores by the end of next year, following declining sales over the past two years.

raw.headline: Qatari Fund Cooks Up a Premium Papa Johns Bid
